Title: Audio-Oscar: A Multi-Agent System for Complex Audio Scene Generation, Orchestration, and Refinement
Affiliation: Shanghai Jiao Tong University (X-LANCE Lab), Shanghai Innovation Institute, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Xiamen University
Author: Yifan Duan, Qixiang Xu, Hengtao Wu, Zhanxun Liu, Wenhao Guan, Junxi Liu, Ziyang Ma, Kelu Xu, Xie Chen
Description: Audio-Oscar is a multi-agent framework that coordinates specialist agents (character and voice design, speech generation, fine-grained timeline planning, model selection, non-speech generation, and audio post-production) to produce long-form, controllable audio from complex scene descriptions. The authors also introduce ASG-Bench for evaluating complex audio scene generation.
